notes: Local build, formatting, lint, unit, race, integration, security, and coverage gates passed. gosec was not installed; the mage security target reported the missing optional tool and continued.

Guest boot and rsync succeeded. Provisioning failed at the required KVM preflight with /dev/kvm not found. Guest-side mage ci, daemon health, and Firecracker verify.sh did not run because the provider did not expose KVM.

environment: Vagrant 2.4.9, vagrant-parallels 2.4.7, Parallels Desktop 26.1.1, bento/ubuntu-24.04 arm64
notes: The VM accepted --nested-virt on, but prlctl start failed before guest boot with Unable to start the virtual machine. The Vagrantfile now defaults Parallels nested virtualization off and allows explicit opt-in through NANOFUSE_PARALLELS_NESTED=1.
